steps.title: Identify the similarity worth highlighting
steps.content: Both Uros House and The Mirror Connection are LED light sculptures created by Grimanesa Amoros — that's their key shared characteristic.

steps.title: Select the choice that emphasizes this shared trait
steps.content: Choice C uses “as is” to establish a parallel structure between both pieces. Choice A focuses on only one, B emphasizes their size difference, and D explicitly contrasts them. That matches choice C — C is correct.
